title: heptapleurum barteri
intro: Heptapleurum barteri, also known as the African umbrella plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to West Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heptapleurum barteri include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Heptapleurum barteri can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and the leaves can be used as a poultice to treat wounds and skin irritations.
